book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called the good luck chinese food takeaway
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 8 people at 12:45 on monday
If the booking fails how about 11:45
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called kirkwood house
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type

info.name: the good luck chinese food takeaway
